# Notion Page Registry
# Auto-generated by CSA OS setup. Maps local accounts to Notion page IDs.
# This file is written during setup Phase 5 and updated by add-account.
# Format: KEY=value

DB={database-id}
DATA_SOURCE={data-source-id}

# Views (created during setup Phase 5.3)
VIEW_DEFAULT={view-id}
VIEW_RENEWAL={view-id}
VIEW_AT_RISK={view-id}
VIEW_BOARD={view-id}

# Workspace (created during setup Phase 5.4)
WORKSPACE={workspace-page-id}
WORKSPACE:ledger={ledger-page-id}
WORKSPACE:profile={profile-page-id}

# Accounts (one block per account, created sequentially)
# ACCOUNT:{Name}={parent-page-id}
# ACCOUNT:{Name}:context={context-child-id}
# ACCOUNT:{Name}:manifest={manifest-child-id}
